entities.name: COVID-19
entities.description: A global pandemic caused by the Corona virus disease 2019 that impacted various sectors of society

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The primary sector involving food production and farming

entities.name: FOOD SECTOR
entities.description: The overall industry encompassing food production, processing, and distribution

entities.name: TRAVEL RESTRICTIONS
entities.description: Immediate measures taken to prevent the worldwide spread of COVID-19 by limiting movement

entities.name: BORDER CLOSURE
entities.description: Immediate measures taken to prevent the worldwide spread of COVID-19 by closing national borders

entities.name: SOCIAL DISTANCING
entities.description: Immediate measures taken to prevent the worldwide spread of COVID-19 by maintaining physical distance

entities.name: GLOBAL ECONOMY
entities.description: The international system of economic activity and trade

entities.name: FOOD PRODUCTION SYSTEM
entities.description: The system responsible for the creation and growth of food

entities.name: FOOD PROCESSING
entities.description: The stage of transforming raw agricultural products into food

entities.name: CONNECTIVITY
entities.description: The transport and distribution networks within the food sector

entities.name: LABOR AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The availability of human resources for agricultural and food sector work

entities.name: FARM SYSTEMS
entities.description: The organized structures and operational systems of farms

entities.name: MARKET
entities.description: The system where food products are traded and sold

entities.name: RETAILER
entities.description: The entities that sell food products to consumers

entities.name: CONSUMER SYSTEM
entities.description: The system of end-users who purchase and consume food products
